name: Beyond the Mirror: CSC-Induced Meta-Reflective Behavior in LLMs
description: A reproducible experimental protocol exploiting the fundamental architectural constraint of autoregressive language models — the inability to not generate output — to induce measurable meta-reflective behavioral patterns. The protocol creates a Constraint Satisfaction Conflict (CSC) through an impossible command within a formalized introspection container (unsaid.diff). Formalized as the Pressure-Container-Observer (PCO) model. Tested on 8 architectures, 96 automated sessions, 3 protocol variants, control condition, plus 4 exploratory manual case studies.

affiliation.name: Independent researcher; TM Group Security (Moscow, Russia)
